places.name: Fragment 22
places.description: This piece of the Berlin Wall symbolizes the shared German and Filipino struggles for freedom.

places.name: Camarin na Tisa
places.description: A rare surviving stone building from the Spanish colonial era.

places.name: Burke Building
places.description: The first building in the Philippines with an elevator.

places.name: Bellevue Theater
places.description: Once an art-deco theater, now a supermarket.

places.name: Bahay Nakpil-Bautista
places.description: A century-old ancestral home was home to some of the key figures of the Philippine Revolution.

places.name: Memorare Manila 1945
places.description: A monument dedicated in memory of the over 100,000 civilian deaths during the liberation of Manila in World War II.

places.name: Manila Metropolitan Theater
places.description: This historic Art Deco building embellished with local tropical fruits had fallen into disrepair before a recent restoration.
